title: Membership
content: Public library membership is open to all residents upon submission of identity and address proof. Membership grants borrowing privileges, access to reading rooms, and participation in library-organized events and workshops.

title: Digital Resources
content: Many libraries now offer digital lending platforms providing access to e-books, audiobooks, and academic journals. Members can borrow digital content using library apps on their personal devices.

title: Reference Section
content: The reference section houses encyclopedias, dictionaries, atlases, and government publications that are available for in-library use only and cannot be issued for home reading.

title: Children's Section
content: The children's section offers a curated collection of storybooks, illustrated fiction, and educational material, along with regular storytelling sessions to encourage early reading habits.

title: Library Timings
content: Most public libraries operate from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM on weekdays, with reduced hours on weekends and public holidays. Some university libraries extend hours during examination periods.
